metadata.siteTitle: BitByBit Cursats — Sats for everyone, pesos for those who need them
metadata.description: Lightning checkout for teachers and educational creators. Buyers pay in sats; you choose how to get paid — sats to your wallet, or pesos to your CBU.
metadata.ogHeadline: Sats for everyone. Pesos for those who need them.
metadata.ogTagline: Lightning checkout for teachers and educational creators.

comingSoon.tagline: Buy your next class with sats.
comingSoon.body: We're building the Lightning checkout for teachers and educational creators. Coming soon.

hero.title: Buy your next class with <gradient>sats</gradient>.
hero.subtitle: Pay for classes, workshops, and study material with your Lightning wallet. The teacher chooses how to get paid: sats to their wallet, or pesos to their CBU.

howItWorks.metadataDescription: Cursats uses Lightning so the buyer pays in sats. The teacher chooses how to get paid: sats straight to their wallet, or pesos to their CBU via Wapu. Here's how it works, step by step.

hero.title: <gradient>Sats</gradient> for everyone. <gradient>Pesos</gradient> for those who need them.
hero.subtitle: Cursats connects people who want to learn with people who want to teach. Lightning for payments; sats or pesos for payouts — the teacher decides. The platform stays out of the way.

buyers.title: If you're buying a course
buyers.step1Body: Browse the catalog, open the offering, and check the price in sats and pesos. No account required.
buyers.step2Body: Scan the QR with your Lightning wallet or copy the invoice. We detect the payment automatically and take you to the receipt.
buyers.step3Body: A redemption code or a direct download, depending on the offering. The receipt is a permanent URL — save it. If you connect your Nostr, you can also see your purchases from the platform.

creators.title: If you teach something
creators.step1Body: Your Nostr key is your account. No emails, no long forms.
creators.step2Title: Set up how you get paid
creators.step2Body: In Settings you add your Lightning Address (if you already live in sats) or your CBU/alias to get paid in pesos via Wapu. It's the only thing you need before publishing.
creators.step3Body: Tap "Publish your course", fill in the form, and submit. When someone buys it and pays with Lightning, the money goes straight to where you set it up — the platform never touches it.

glossary.title: Who's who
glossary.lightningBody: The payment layer on top of Bitcoin. Instant, cheap, perfect for the small day-to-day amounts. It's always what the buyer pays with, no matter how the teacher gets paid.
glossary.wapuBody: The rail that converts sats to pesos and deposits them in the teacher's CBU or alias. Built for teachers who'd rather get paid in pesos and keep their money in their usual bank, without having to use a Bitcoin wallet.
glossary.lightningAddressBody: An email-style address (you@walletofsatoshi.com) where the teacher receives sats straight to their wallet. For teachers who already live in sats, with no converter in the middle.
glossary.nostrBody: An open protocol for identity and messaging. Your key is your account — required for teachers (it's the only way to create and manage your courses), optional for buyers.

custody.title: Your money, your keys
custody.body: Cursats never holds the funds. Every payment goes straight to the destination the teacher picked — pesos to a CBU via Wapu, or sats to a Lightning Address. If Cursats disappears tomorrow, payments still land: we aren't the rail.

features.metadataDescription: What Cursats offers: two ways to get paid (sats or pesos), no custody, optional Nostr login, in-app delivery, and more.

hero.title: What Cursats offers
hero.subtitle: The minimum needed to sell classes in sats — whether you want to cash out in pesos or stay in sats.

items.twoRailsBody: The buyer always pays in Lightning. The teacher chooses: pesos to their CBU via Wapu (for those who want to keep their bank routine), or sats straight to their Lightning Address (for those who already live in sats).
items.noCustodyBody: Every payment goes straight to the destination the teacher picked — to their CBU via Wapu, or to their Lightning Address. The platform never holds the funds.
items.anonymousByDefaultBody: The buyer arrives, pays, and leaves with a code or download. No forms, no emails, no required accounts.
items.optionalNostrLoginBody: If the buyer connects their Nostr identity, they see their order history from any device.
items.deliveryInAppBody: Permanent receipt at a URL. With a Nostr identity, you can also see your purchases from the platform. No email integration.
items.oneShotBody: The buyer pays with Lightning and it's confirmed automatically in seconds. We take them straight to the receipt, no extra steps.
items.creatorAccountBody: Manage your courses, payout settings, and orders from your account. Sign in with your Nostr key.
items.codesOrDownloadsBody: Each offering delivers a redemption code (from a pool you upload) or a direct download. You choose per offering.
items.openMarketplaceBody: Anyone with a Nostr identity publishes and sells from their own URL (cursats.bitbybit.com.ar/your-slug). No application, no approval: sign in and you can sell.

faq.metadataDescription: Quick answers to what buyers and teachers most often ask about Cursats.

hero.title: Frequently asked questions
hero.subtitle: What buyers and teachers ask most. Missing something? Open a discussion on GitHub.

questions.lightningA: It's the payment network on top of Bitcoin. Designed for instant, cheap transfers, ideal for the small day-to-day amounts.
questions.walletQ: Do I need a wallet to buy?
questions.walletA: Yes, any Lightning wallet works. If you're starting out, we recommend LaWallet — it's Argentine, open, and supports Nostr login.
questions.wapuA: Wapu is the sponsor of La Crypta's Hackathon #3 and one of the two payout rails: it converts the buyer's sats to pesos and sends them to the teacher's CBU or alias. It's the option for teachers who want to keep getting paid in pesos, without touching Bitcoin.
questions.argentinaQ: Does it only work in Argentina?
questions.argentinaA: The Lightning rail (getting paid in sats to your wallet) works anywhere. The Wapu rail (getting paid in pesos to a CBU) only works in Argentina, because it settles to Argentine bank CBUs or aliases.
questions.anonymousQ: Do I need to create an account to buy?
questions.anonymousA: No. Purchase is anonymous by default: you pay, you get the receipt, that's it. The receipt URL is your permanent proof.
questions.deliveryQ: How do I get what I bought?
questions.deliveryA: If the offering is a redemption code, you see it on the receipt. If it's a download, you click the button and the file downloads. If you connected Nostr at checkout, it also arrives via encrypted DM.
questions.lostReceiptQ: What if I lose the receipt link?
questions.lostReceiptA: If your Nostr was connected, you'll find it under "My orders". If you bought anonymously, you can sign in with Nostr and claim the order by pasting the order ID on the claim page.
questions.creatorPayoutQ: How do I get paid as a teacher?
questions.creatorPayoutA: You pick how to get paid in Settings: pesos to a CBU or alias (via Wapu), or sats straight to your Lightning Address. Each payment lands separately at the destination you chose — Cursats never touches the money.
questions.nostrSignInQ: What is Nostr and why do I use it to sign in?
questions.nostrSignInA: Nostr is an open identity and messaging protocol. Your private key is your account — no central servers, no email. For teachers, it's the only way to create and manage your courses.
questions.feesA: If you get paid in pesos, Wapu charges its settlement fee on each CBU payout. If you get paid in sats to your Lightning Address, you skip the converter entirely: only the standard Lightning routing fees may apply. The Cursats platform itself doesn't take an additional cut in v1.

type.code: You receive a redemption code as soon as you pay.

checkout.title: Pay for your order
checkout.instructions: Scan the QR with your Lightning wallet, or copy the invoice and paste it into your payment app.
checkout.expired: This invoice has expired. Go back to the offering and generate a new one.

status.paid: Payment received! Taking you to the receipt…
status.failed: We could not confirm the payment. Try again.

receipt.title: All set! Your purchase is confirmed.
receipt.subtitle: Save this page: it's your permanent receipt.

settlement.ars: Settled in pesos to the teacher's CBU/alias.
settlement.sats: Settled in sats to the teacher's Lightning Address.

code.label: Redemption code

download.label: Your download

nostrPrompt.title: Want to save this order to your Nostr?

codePool.remaining: You have {count} code(s) available. When the pool runs out, the course is marked "sold out" until you mint more.
codePool.mintFailed: Couldn't mint the codes. Try again.

form.sectionBasicsHint: How the course shows up on your storefront and in the explorer.
form.sectionPricingHint: Pick the currency you want to be paid in. The other one is computed at Wapu's exchange rate at each purchase.
form.sectionContentHint: Pick how you deliver the course to the buyer.
form.sectionCoverHint: Shows in the listing and on the course page.
form.slugHint: URL identifier. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
form.codeCountExample: 50 codes = up to 50 sales before you need to mint more.
form.imageUrlTooltip: JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 5 MB. Uploaded with your Nostr signature to a Blossom server.
form.typeCodeHint: Buyer receives one code from the pool when they pay.
form.typeDownloadHint: Buyer downloads a file after payment.
form.title: Title
form.priceSatsHint: Leave empty to compute the sats price at purchase time.

imageUpload.pasteUrlInstead: Already hosting it elsewhere? Paste the URL.
imageUpload.hint: JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 5 MB. The image is uploaded to Blossom with your Nostr signature.
imageUpload.errorBadType: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP are accepted.
imageUpload.errorUploadFailed: Couldn't upload the image. Try again.
imageUpload.errorCancelled: You cancelled the signature. The image wasn't uploaded.
imageUpload.errorNoServers: No Blossom servers configured. Tell the deployer.

form.codeCountHint: The platform mints unique codes automatically. Each purchase consumes one; when the pool runs out, the course is marked "sold out" until you mint more.
form.codePoolRemaining: Codes remaining: {count}. When this hits zero the course is marked sold out — mint more with the button below to put it back on sale.
form.downloadUrlHint: Where the file is hosted. We serve it through an access-controlled proxy.
form.downloadUrlRequired: Enter the file URL before saving.
form.invalidPriceAmount: Price must be a positive integer.
form.invalidCodeCount: Code count must be between 1 and 10,000.
form.imageRequired: Upload or paste a cover image before saving.
form.priceCurrencyArsHint: Buyers see the sats equivalent at the current exchange rate.
form.priceCurrencySatsHint: Buyers see the ARS equivalent at the current exchange rate.
form.priceAmountHint: The amount converts to the other currency at purchase time.
form.typeLocked: Type cannot be changed after the course is created.
form.saveFailed: Couldn't save the course. Try again.
form.slugTaken: A course with that slug already exists.
form.invalidPriceArs: ARS price must be a positive integer.
form.invalidPriceSats: Sats price must be a positive integer.
form.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this course? It will stop appearing in the storefront.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Sales history for your storefront. Read-only in v1.

detail.title: Order detail
detail.readOnlyHint: Orders are read-only in v1: no refunds, no resends, no manual delivery flagging.

settings.title: Your account
settings.subtitle: Edit your profile, payout method, and preferences.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.hint: Pick your default language. Theme (light / dark) is saved in your browser via the navbar toggle.
preferences.languageHint: Applied the next time you sign in. You can still switch temporarily from the navbar whenever you want.
preferences.themeHint: Theme switching lives in the navbar and is saved per device, not per account.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.hint: Pick which events ring the bell. Turning one off stops emitting new notifications; existing history isn't touched.

orderPaid.title: Tell me when a payment of mine confirms
orderPaid.hint: When you buy a course, we ping you once the Lightning payment confirms.

saleReceived.title: Tell me when someone buys my course
saleReceived.hint: When a buyer pays for one of your courses, we ping you so you can see the sale in "Orders".

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.hint: Permanent actions on your account. Think twice before continuing.
danger.deleteAccountHint: We scrub your profile data and disable the account. Your purchase history stays tied to your pubkey, but you can no longer sign in with this account.

modalBullets.profile: Your name, bio, picture, and payout details are scrubbed from Cursats.
modalBullets.offerings: Your courses stop appearing in the catalog and on your storefront.
modalBullets.history: Existing orders and signed Nostr events stay — they're immutable. But you can no longer sign in with this identity.

danger.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete the account. Try again.
danger.signCancelled: You cancelled the signature. Try again when you're ready.

form.syncSuccess: Pre-filled with what's on your relays. Review and save to keep it.
form.syncFailed: Couldn't read your profile from the relays. Try again in a moment.
form.publishSuccess: Updated kind:0 published to public relays.
form.publishFailed: Couldn't publish the event. Try again.
form.prefilledFromNostr: Some fields were pre-filled from your Nostr profile. Review and save to lock them into Cursats.
form.sectionProfileHint: How buyers see you at cursats.bitbybit.com.ar/{slug}.
form.displayNameTooltip: The name buyers see on your storefront and in the catalog. Seeded from your Nostr profile — feel free to override.
form.displayNameRequired: Display name must be at least 2 characters.
form.bioTooltip: One or two lines about you. Shown under your name on your storefront. Up to 500 characters.
form.avatarUrlTooltip: Public URL of your profile picture. Pulled from Nostr at first sign-in; you can change it any time.
form.avatarUrlInvalid: Enter a valid URL or leave it empty.
form.bannerUrlTooltip: Wide banner shown at the top of your storefront. Leave it empty and we use a gradient.
form.bannerUrlInvalid: Enter a valid URL or leave it empty.
form.lightningAddressTooltip: Lightning Address in user@domain format. If you pick the sats rail, buyers pay here. Your provider must support LUD-21.
form.lightningAddressFromNostr: We pulled this address from your Nostr profile (lud16). Review and save it if you want to keep it.
form.lightningAddressRequired: Add a Lightning Address to receive sats.
form.lightningAddressInvalid: That Lightning Address didn't respond or doesn't support LUD-21. Try WoS, Strike, Alby Hub, LNbits, ZBD or Primal.
form.sectionPayoutHint: Pick the currency you receive your sales in. You can switch later. The details stay here and never show up anywhere on the buyer side.
form.railArsHint: Wapu converts the sats to ARS and deposits to your Argentine bank.
form.railSatsHint: Sats land directly in your wallet, no Wapu in between. Your provider must support LUD-21.
form.payoutLnNote: We pay out to the Lightning Address you set under Public profile above. Edit it there if you want to change it.
form.cbuTooltip: Argentine bank routing number — 22 digits. Wapu deposits ARS into this account. If you also have an alias, you only need one of the two.
Argentine bank routing number — 22 digits. Wapu deposits ARS into this account. If you also have an alias, you only need one of the two.
form.aliasTooltip: Human-readable alias for your CBU (3–20 characters, letters/numbers/dots). Only you see this page; Wapu uses the value to route the deposit.
form.destinationRequired: You need at least a CBU or an alias.
form.signRequiredTitle: Confirm the change with your signature
form.signRequiredBody: Changing the CBU, alias or Lightning Address requires an additional signature from your Nostr signer.
form.signCancelled: You cancelled the signature. Try again when you're ready.
form.signClockSkew: Your device clock is out of sync. Sync it and try again.

login.title: Sign in with Nostr
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your courses or save your purchases.
login.extensionDescription: Nostr WoT, Alby, nos2x or another extension
login.nsecWarning: Your private key should never leave your device. Only paste it on trusted sites, and consider using a Nostr extension instead.
login.nsecAcceptRisk: I understand the risk and want to paste my key in this browser.
login.no_extension: No Nostr extension detected in this browser.
login.nostr_signing_rejected: You cancelled the signature. Try again whenever you're ready.
login.nsecInvalidKey: That doesn't look like a valid key. Check the format (nsec1… or 64 hex chars).
login.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
login.error: We could not sign you in. Try again in a moment.
login.createIdentityDescription: Generate a fresh Nostr identity in one click
login.createdIntro: We generated a new Nostr key for you. Save it before you continue — without it you cannot sign back in.
login.createdWarning: If you lose this key, you lose access to your account. Don't share it with anyone.
login.createdAckLabel: I saved my key somewhere safe.
login.connectScanModalIntro: Open Amber, nsec.app, or any NIP-46 compatible signer and scan this QR.
login.connectSlowHint: Still waiting? Open your signer (Amber, nsec.app, Damus) and approve the request.
login.connectQrAlt: QR code to connect your Nostr signer
login.connectBunkerModalIntro: Paste the bunker:// URL from your remote signer (or a NIP-05 like user@domain).
login.connectApproveInSigner: Approve the connection in your signer
login.connectCompatible: Compatible with Amber, nsec.app, Keychat, nsecBunker and more.
login.connectError: We couldn't connect to your signer. Try again.
login.connectInvalidBunker: That bunker:// URL doesn't look valid.

reSignIn.mismatch: That key doesn't match your current session.

form.slugHint: Used in your public URL: cursats.bitbybit.com.ar/{your-slug}. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
form.slugTaken: That handle is taken. Try another.

slugErrors.format: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (and no leading or trailing hyphens).
slugErrors.reserved: That handle is reserved by the platform. Pick another.

form.displayNameTooShort: Display name needs at least 2 characters.
form.bioPlaceholder: A line or two about what you teach.
form.destination: Bank alias or CBU for payouts
form.destinationHint: Optional now. Add it from Settings before your first sale — without it, checkout will reject buyers.
form.destinationInvalid: Alias is 6–20 characters (letters, numbers, dots, hyphens). CBU is exactly 22 digits.
